question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"static basic_json parse\\(|string_t dump\\(|friend std::ostream& operator<<|friend std::ostream& operator>>|accept\\(|sax_parse\\(\" include\\nlohmann\\json.hpp"
graph.answer:
The central runtime flow here is the header-only `nlohmann::json` text parse/serialize pipeline.

**Runtime Flow**
- Public entrypoint for parsing is [`include/nlohmann/json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/json.hpp#L4090): `json::parse(...)` constructs a `detail::parser`.
- The parser core lives in [`include/nlohmann/detail/input/parser.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/parser.hpp#L60) and drives recursive-descent parsing via `sax_parse_internal`.
- Tokenization happens in [`include/nlohmann/detail/input/lexer.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/lexer.hpp#L134).
- Parsed values are built through the SAX DOM handlers in [`include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp#L167) and [`include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp#L473); validation-only parsing uses [`include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp#L910).
- Public serialization is [`include/nlohmann/json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/json.hpp#L1338) (`dump()`), with stream output in [`include/nlohmann/json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/json.hpp#L4050).
- Serialization work is done by [`include/nlohmann/detail/output/serializer.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/output/serializer.hpp#L51), which writes through adapters from [`include/nlohmann/detail/output/output_adapters.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/output/output_adapters.hpp#L30).
- `get<T>()` / `get_to()` and the user-defined conversion bridge sit in [`include/nlohmann/json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/json.hpp#L1636) and [`include/nlohmann/json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/json.hpp#L1864), backed by [`include/nlohmann/detail/conversions/from_json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/conversions/from_json.hpp#L47), [`include/nlohmann/detail/conversions/to_json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/conversions/to_json.hpp#L268), and [`include/nlohmann/adl_serializer.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/adl_serializer.hpp#L22).

**Read Next**
- [`tests/src/unit-class_parser.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-class_parser.cpp#L217): parser helpers and the main `TEST_CASE("parser class")` at line 349; this is the best first test file for parse behavior.
- [`tests/src/unit-user_defined_input.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-user_defined_input.cpp#L18): input-adapter coverage for iterators, containers, and custom begin/end.
- [`tests/src/unit-convenience.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-convenience.cpp#L97): `dump_escaped` and string escaping behavior.
- [`tests/src/unit-constructor1.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-constructor1.cpp#L24): constructors plus `get<T>()`/round-trip conversion cases; the `dump()` edge cases for NaN/inf are near line 906.
- [`tests/src/unit-constructor2.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-constructor2.cpp#L14): copy/move/destructor coverage for the remaining object lifecycle behavior.

**If You Change One Thing First**
- Parser behavior: start with [`unit-class_parser.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-class_parser.cpp#L349), then read [`parser.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/parser.hpp#L60) and [`json_sax.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/input/json_sax.hpp#L167).
- Serializer behavior: start with [`unit-convenience.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-convenience.cpp#L107), then read [`serializer.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/output/serializer.hpp#L51).
- Conversion or user-defined types: start with [`unit-constructor1.cpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/tests/src/unit-constructor1.cpp#L24), then read [`from_json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/conversions/from_json.hpp#L47) and [`to_json.hpp`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/json/include/nlohmann/detail/conversions/to_json.hpp#L268).

If you want, I can turn this into a one-page “follow this call stack in order” checklist with the exact functions to open next.
